name: Activity Feed
description: Chronological list of activity events with avatars, timestamps, and action descriptions. Used in dashboards and profile pages.

slots.header: Section title with _heading5 and optional filter/date-range controls
slots.feed: Timeline of activity items, each with Avatar, action Text, timestamp Badge, and Separator between entries
slots.load-more: Optional Button at bottom for pagination

command-center.notes: Header uses cc-bar with cc-label. Timestamps use cc-data. Feed area gets cc-scanline. New/unread items get cc-glow pulse.

auradecantism.notes: Feed in d-glass panel. New items highlighted with subtle glow. Timestamps in muted text.

clean.notes: Feed in bordered container. Simple list items with bottom borders.
